Excerpts from "FULL SCRIPT Aisha ACTS 1-11.pdf" were reviewed, detailing scenes at the city gates, including a fading magical barrier, approaching caravans, a merchant with glowing beetles rejected by a clerk, and the dramatic entrance of Altair, the Royal Hawk, carrying a sealed scroll.
